SEARCH
Package edu.bu.pas.risk.territory

Record Class Territory

java.lang.Object
java.lang.Record
edu.bu.pas.risk.territory.Territory
Record Components:
id - The unique idx.
name - The name of this territory, e.g. "North Africa".
continent - The continent that this territory belongs to.
adjacentTerritories - The territories connected to this territory.
All Implemented Interfaces:
Keyed, Cloneable, Iterable<Territory>
public record Territory(int id, String name, Continent continent, Set<Territory> adjacentTerritories) extends Record implements Cloneable, Iterable<Territory>, Keyed
1 single immutable territory or country that can be captured.

A territory represents all info needed to traverse the map, since a territory is a fully connected graph. You can view the neighbors using adjacentTerritories(), which returns an immutable list of all adjacent territories. You might consider doing BFS (or other graph traversal) strategies to gather information.

  • Constructor Details

    • Territory

      public Territory(int id, String name, Continent continent, Set<Territory> adjacentTerritories)
      Creates an instance of a Territory record class.
      Parameters:
      id - the value for the id record component
      name - the value for the name record component
      continent - the value for the continent record component
      adjacentTerritories - the value for the adjacentTerritories record component

  • Method Details

    • isAdjacentTo

      public boolean isAdjacentTo(Territory territory)
      Returns true if the given territory is adjacent to this one.
      Parameters:
      territory - The territory to check.
      Returns:
      true if the territory is adjacent.

    • equals

      public boolean equals(Object other)
      Indicates whether some other object is "equal to" this one. The objects are equal if the other object is of the same class and if all the record components are equal. Reference components are compared with Objects::equals(Object,Object); primitive components are compared with '=='.
      Specified by:
      equals in class Record
      Parameters:
      other - the object with which to compare
      Returns:
      true if this object is the same as the other argument; false otherwise.

    • hashCode

      public int hashCode()
      Returns a hash code value for this object. The value is derived from the hash code of each of the record components.
      Specified by:
      hashCode in class Record
      Returns:
      a hash code value for this object

    • clone

      public Territory clone()
      Overrides:

    • toString

      public String toString()
      Returns a string representation of this record class. The representation contains the name of the class, followed by the name and value of each of the record components.
      Specified by:
      toString in class Record
      Returns:
      a string representation of this object

    • iterator

      public Iterator<Territory> iterator()
      Returns an iterator over the adjacent territories.
      Specified by:
      iterator in interface Iterable<Territory>
      Returns:
